name: autoimprove-marketplace
description: Autonomous optimization loop for AI agents. Describe what to improve, how to measure it, and walk away.

plugins.name: autoimprove
plugins.description: Autonomous optimization loop. Point it at files, a check command, and a score — then walk away. Supports 12 domains: perf, ml, automl, rag, docker, k8s, prompt, sql, frontend, ci, skill, image.
